topic: Glycogen depletion — the trigger for fat burning
caption: 🔥 Did you know your body has a secret switch to burn fat? 💡 It starts with glycogen depletion. When you deplete your glycogen stores, your body begins to break down fat for energy. 💪 Here are the facts: glycogen is stored in your muscles and liver, and it's the primary source of energy for your body. 🏋️‍♀️ But when you're on a low-carb diet or fasting, your glycogen stores are depleted, triggering your body to switch to fat burning mode. 🌟 This process is called metabolic switching. 💻 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #glycogen #fatburning #lowcarb #fasting #metabolicswitching #weightloss #healthyliving
